item.title: Campaign 2: Bonus Episode - Great Kings and Venturers! Part 3
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Bonus Episode - Great Kings and Venturers! Part 3
item.description:
Welcome to the Chaotic Caves of Chaos. Where the magics are so out of sync with the natural weave of arcane energy that sometimes the wires get crossed and spells have unintended consequences. Like accidentally going full isekai.


This is part 3 of “Great Kings and Venturers”, an adventure DMed by Tim where the cast plays as themselves within the Chaotic Caves of Chaos. It may take place in the same world, maybe, but it is completely separate from either Campaign 1 or 2. So no spoilers or background info needed!


The adventure continues with Mike Bachmann (Mike Bachmann), Jennifer Cheek (Jennifer Cheek), Nika Howard (Nika Howard), and our Dungeon Master Tim Lanning. Edited by Vincent.


Want the world to see your fan art? Post it with #DrunksAndDoodles.


Find more info by clicking right here -https://linktr.ee/GAPCast

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 182 - Big Bad Bread Wars
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 182 - Big Bad Bread Wars
item.description:
I am not going to say his name since he is trying real hard, but, this week we have to deal with a lot of bread antics. Maybe Screech is dealing with a new rival. Maybe an old man wants to be adopted. Who knows. Regardless, all this bread is just a distraction from our true goal - going to a wedding. I think.


The 2026 Geekly Inc 24-Hour Charity Stream airs on Twitch on the 25th April!


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Edited by Vincent.


Podcast art by Zack Meyman AKA Zoomtoonz! Want the world to see your fan art? Post it with #DrunksAndDoodles.


Find more info by clicking right here -https://linktr.ee/GAPCast

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 181 - Check Point Bing Bong
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 181 - Check Point Bing Bong
item.description:
After the Wine Cellar was attacked our heroes must needs to redirect both their attention and, honestly, the attention of everyone at the Von Esper away from the weird robot mole. It could take a series of lies or half truths. Or it could take simply scootin' on out of there to get the Bell from the OT check point. Probably. Maybe.


Help out people being oppressed in Minnesota and Kansas!


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Edited by Vincent.


Podcast art by Zack Meyman AKA Zoomtoonz! Want the world to see your fan art? Post it with #DrunksAndDoodles.


Find more info by clicking right here -https://linktr.ee/GAPCast

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 180 - Super Rat Day
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 180 - Super Rat Day
item.description:
Things have gone from bad to weird, to worse and weird, but at least we have a task to accomplish. Turns out there may be some rats in the damn cellar! This is the perfect way to 1) get out of this pre-wedding-setup room and 2) earn some good will with the Von Espers. And, honestly, a quest to go fight a large rat? We are super high level. This will be easy.


Help out people being oppressed in Minnesota and Kansas!


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Edited by Vincent.


Podcast art by Zack Meyman AKA Zoomtoonz! Want the world to see your fan art? Post it with #DrunksAndDoodles.

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 179 - Von Esper's Very Sad Wedding Day
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 179 - Von Esper's Very Sad Wedding Day
item.description:
We get to meet Selene's very normal brother on his very special wedding day! First though, the crew decides they need a little bit of intel on the whole family situation. So, naturally, we end up in in a screaming match in and around a bathroom.


Help out people being oppressed in Minnesota and Kansas!


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Edited by Vincent.


Podcast art by TheDedchicken! Want the world to see your fan art? Post it with #DrunksAndDoodles

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 178 - Three Perfect Plans
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 178 - Three Perfect Plans
item.description:
The Farholde guards have already started their unjust crackdown on magical folk so it is up to us to stop them! This shall not stand while we are here and we have many tools at our disposal to foil all their nasty plans. Sometimes our solutions maybe worse in the long run what with the natural spread of fire or the uncontrollability of varmints, but that is a problem for another day.


Help out people being oppressed in Minnesota and Kansas!


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Edited by Vincent.


Podcast art by TheDedchicken! Want the world to see your fan art? Post it with #DrunksAndDoodles

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 177 - Tuxedo Bazaar Beatdown
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 177 - Tuxedo Bazaar Beatdown
item.description:
Since we have to go to Selene's family's wedding, we must needs get dressed up all fancy like. Unfortunately, the store owner needs to learn a little lesson about class consciousness, so we may end up doing something not so heroic. But, hey, fashion can be a battlefield too, sometimes.


Help out people being oppressed in Minnesota and Kansas!


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Edited by Vincent.


Podcast art by https://twitter.com/sanderdoesart! Want the world to see your fan art? Post it with #DrunksAndDoodles

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 176 - Mossy Wall of Soothing Reassurance
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 176 - Mossy Wall of Soothing Reassurance
item.description:
Our heroes are still reeling from the heavy cavalcade of truths revealed last week, but they must continue on in their quest to stop the empire. Perhaps the truth has brought them all the closer together, and reminded them what they are truly fighting for.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Edited by Vincent.

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 175 - Bigger, Madder Family
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 175 - Bigger, Madder Family
item.description:
Turns out that some folks have been hiding secrets within the group. Not to name any names but certain people with certain tuna can shaped things have maybe been living a double life for days! Well, it all comes out during a brunch of only alcohol thrown by a dragon.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Edited by Vincent.

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 174 - Horse Armor
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 174 - Horse Armor
item.description:
Time to secure a different type of Ward. One that protect and conceal instead of getting lost in the mines. It should have been a simple side quest but it seems when the OT ransacks a magical shoppe things are bound to go wrong. Luckily, their bungle was way worse for them than it should be for us. We are really, really used to dealing with bungled up and over powered monsters.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon MasterMichael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart! 


Podcast art by https://bsky.app/profile/killurmonkeyart.bsky.social!


Want the world to see your fan art?


Post it with #DrunksAndDoodles

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 173 - Level 13 Gang
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 173 - Level 13 Gang
item.description:
Our heroes hit level 13! A great cheer of relief fills the city as all four of our original characters have survived this long. You know what that means! Time to test Michael DMing skilling and general tolerance for his friends antics like Job from the Bible.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon MasterMichael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 172 - The Horrors Inside
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 172 - The Horrors Inside
item.description:
After a dangerous prison break our heroes must needs return to the resistance's hideout. Though, temporary, it's location must be kept a secret for fear of the OT's retribution! The city is an an uproar and escapes prisoners are running amok - the perfect time to make their escape!


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart! 


Podcast art by https://bsky.app/profile/bendrawslife.bsky.social!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 171 - Oralboros
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 171 - Oralboros
item.description:
When you do a jail break, even a jail break from a really bad, fascist government, you gotta make sure you don't like, let out any cannibals or what have you. Honestly, the evil government probably accidentally arrested some political prisoners who happened to be cannibals, or what have you, without meaning to. Letting them out would be a real PR nightmare for the movement so I guess you kinda gotta like, make sure you don't let out any cannibals, or what have you.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart! 


Podcast art by https://twitter.com/ZackMeyman!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 170 - Barbara Nana
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 170 - Barbara Nana
item.description:
Basement Level 2... we knew something or someone scary and/or dangerous was going to be guarding the prisoners but we were truly not prepared for what we saw. Sure, we can fight anything, and have, but like, it is super scary sometimes. You never really except to see big robot animals, even if you have fought like a dozen large robot animals.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart! 


Podcast art by https://x.com/TheTallPeasant!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 169 - Good Ol' Guard Love
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 169 - Good Ol' Guard Love
item.description:
We head deeper into The Slab now that the conduit is down and who knows what will be hidden away in their top secret lair. Well, it is also a somewhat normal government building so I'm sure we will have to go wade through some normal stuff. Maybe their filing system is evil or something? Probably something nefarious around every corner...probably.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 168 - Tug Rope and Grease
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 168 - Tug Rope and Grease
item.description:
Our heroes are presented with a classic hurdle - a long hallway with their objective at the end. Clearly there are some sort of defenses hidden somewhere but something tells me our magical rope will cure all our issues.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Bonus New Years 2025 Outtakes!
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Bonus New Years 2025 Outtakes!
item.description:
Ring in the New Year with this special, outtakes-centric episode! We’ve gathered a collection of behind-the-scenes moments from the entire Season 2 arc—spanning Episode 0 all the way through Episode 165 (plus a few extra surprises).

Like what you hear? Head over to https://www.patreon.com/dndpodcast, where subscribers unlock countless hours of exclusive content, including original adventures, full outtakes from the main show, behind-the-scenes “making of” videos, and much more you won’t find anywhere else.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 167 - Lean-to Learn-too
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 167 - Lean-to Learn-too
item.description:
The time has come to assault The Slab! Screech has ways to keep the worst of the traps and alarms at bay but what will await us as we enter this dark monolith to bureaucratic evils? Will Screech have to go on a date with a nice lady??? Tune in to find out!


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 166 -Screech Echo, Heroically Handsome
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 166 -Screech Echo, Heroically Handsome
item.description:
The Echo Wife Woahs get deeper and deeper as Screech has to dig into his wife past to do the impossible - pay his alimony and court one of his ex-wives. We will always remember the sacrifice he made by speaking to one of his...23? 24 former/ current wives in order to help overthrow a fascist dictatorship.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 163 - Tuna Can Shaped Terrors
item.description:
Now that we are set on breaking into The Slab we gotta come up with a plan! Fortunately, we think we may have an inside source. But their help may not come cheap and Screech may not want to the hefty price.

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 162 - Bad Panther Man
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 162 - Bad Panther Man
item.description:
Keldrin is bleeding a whole lot but we managed to keep him alive enough to finally spill the beans! He probably has some silly excuse for all his crimes but at this point we have heard it all. Would be more interesting if he did it for greed or something. Well, we will see.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 161 - Plugging a Leak
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 161 - Plugging a Leak
item.description:
A chunk of our episode is about the orientation of stairs, doors, and most importantly, stairs that connect to doors. At no time is this important but it is fun to see how everyone interprets the scenes especially when everyone is sort of wrong. It is beautiful.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 160 - Salt and the Better Salt, Pepper
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 160 - Salt and the Better Salt, Pepper
item.description:
Turns out the damn rat owns a spice store in town. You better believe we are peppery over his traitorous ways so hopefully he knows how to defend himself. Frankly, we aim to beat him up and then hopefully he will tell us all he knows. Probably not anything worse, but don't tell him that.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 159 - From Cute to Terrible
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 159 - From Cute to Terrible
item.description:
These dang robots keep attacking us but finally we will get some answers on what makes them tick. And for some reason it feels like we will need to know a lot more about their robotic inner working soon. Just a hunch and a bad feeling. Hopefully it's not like, the worst thing ever. Feels like maybe we jinxed it...


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 158 - Operation Hot Spring Hayboy
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 158 - Operation Hot Spring Hayboy
item.description:
Turns out Ratma rushed to the abandoned hot springs in order to warn us of an imminent attack! Since she was so kind to give us a heads up we knew that this situation called for our best counter ambush strategy - the humble hayboy.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 157 - Hot Springs Episode
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 157 - Hot Springs Episode
item.description:
As often happens in these types of scenarios, scenarios one doesn't really write down if you know what I mean, the gang needs to get out of town and let things cool off a bit. Plus, the OT and the rest of the government have been finding resistance bases in the city so going to an out of town safe spot just makes good sense. At least until a certain head of state's death is more easily dealt with.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 156 - Sins of the Mothers

item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 155 - Death of a Talented Artist
item.description:
Our heroes are in the final stretch of the talent show at the magical circus/ carnival thing. So far, none of the other challengers have posed much of a problem but they still need to face whatever team is hopefully made up of Beaux and J'Michael. The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Bonus Episode - Great Kings and Venturers! Part 2
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Bonus Episode - Great Kings and Venturers! Part 2
item.description:
Welcome to the Chaotic Caves of Chaos. Where the magics are so out of sync with the natural weave of arcane energy that sometimes the wires get crossed and spells have unintended consequences. Like accidentally going full isekai.


This is part 2 of "Great Kings and Venturers", an adventure DMed by Tim where the cast plays as themselves within the Chaotic Caves of Chaos. It may take place in the same world, maybe, but it is completely separate from either Campaign 1 or 2. So no spoilers or background info needed!


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart! 


Want the world to see your fan art?

item.itunes:summary:
Welcome to the Chaotic Caves of Chaos. Where the magics are so out of sync with the natural weave of arcane energy that sometimes the wires get crossed and spells have unintended consequences. Like accidentally going full isekai.


This is part 2 of "Great Kings and Venturers", an adventure DMed by Tim where the cast plays as themselves within the Chaotic Caves of Chaos. It may take place in the same world, maybe, but it is completely separate from either Campaign 1 or 2. So no spoilers or background info needed!


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart! 


Want the world to see your fan art?

item.title: Campaign 2: Super Quiztastic Bonus Episode
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Super Quiztastic Bonus Episode
item.description:
Michael is still out so the PC gang got together to finally drill down and figure out what makes them tic by taking a series of D&D personality quizzes! Our super official scientific and peer reviewed sources were:


https://www.wikihow.com/Dnd-Class-Quiz

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 151 - Zone of Trust
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 151 - Zone of Trust
item.description:
These dang OT jerks got way too close to Ratma's resistance hideout so naturally we gotta figure out how they found us. Screech had to step away so the world's most ok detectives had to step up and gather some clues from their captives. It should work out fine and without any deaths.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 150 - Tunnel Troubles
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 150 - Tunnel Troubles
item.description:
After Selene got found out, through no fault of her own, by the magic police our heroes must face off against the OT and their dreaded animal abominations. With resistance bases being found out left and right it will not be only Selene's life they are fighting for today... but perhaps the resistance as a whole.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 148 - Victory Spoils

Having defeated the mimic it has now become time to divvy up the loot. The team's power level jumps up a few degrees with these magical items and we have even more smoke bombs. We are actually running out of slots to equip and use all of our goodies, which is a really fun problem to have!


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Bonus Episode: Tales From The Foaming Tankard: Season 6 - Guests: Episode 1-2
item.itunes:title: Bonus Episode: Tales From The Foaming Tankard: Season 6 - Guests: Episode 1-2
item.description:
(NOTE: If you are listening to this on your podcast player, it is important to know that you are missing a lot. This is a special video series that you can watch on the Patreon site! Episode 1 is available for FREE right here)


Season 6: "Guests"

Episode 1: "Intro & Decisions"

Episode 2: "Breadcrumbs"

Welcome to the city, Sando's Key. Life has been fairly uneventful until recently. A rash of murders and missing people has plagued the port city in the last month and something must be done!

Luckily, Relvine (MK England), The Caretaker (David Barnhart), Mooge Mansack (Jordan Breeding), and Jim The Protector (Eric Thornett) are here to investigate. Can they come together to discover what is going on?


Join them in their quest!


Dungeon Mastered by David Lee Stewart

Guest Voices: Zack Meyman and Starman

Bart the bartender is played by Michael DiMauro

item.itunes:summary:
(NOTE: If you are listening to this on your podcast player, it is important to know that you are missing a lot. This is a special video series that you can watch on the Patreon site! Episode 1 is available for FREE right here)


Season 6: "Guests"

Episode 1: "Intro & Decisions"

Episode 2: "Breadcrumbs"

Welcome to the city, Sando's Key. Life has been fairly uneventful until recently. A rash of murders and missing people has plagued the port city in the last month and something must be done!

Luckily, Relvine (MK England), The Caretaker (David Barnhart), Mooge Mansack (Jordan Breeding), and Jim The Protector (Eric Thornett) are here to investigate. Can they come together to discover what is going on?


Join them in their quest!


Dungeon Mastered by David Lee Stewart

Guest Voices: Zack Meyman and Starman

Bart the bartender is played by Michael DiMauro

Special appearances from Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), and T'Chuck (Tim Lanning)

Check out MK England and their books here 

Follow the Dr. Jordan Breeding here: Youtube, BSky, X, and Patreon

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 141 - Take My Wife, Please
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 141 - Take My Wife, Please
item.description:
Screech continues his prize fighter career while pushing his luck against fierce foes. Meanwhile, Selene fights just as fiercely on the battlefield of love. Leading both down a dangerous path of broken hearts.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: BONUS EPISODE: Charity Stream 2025
item.itunes:title: BONUS EPISODE: Charity Stream 2025
item.description:
Four unlikely heroes are drawn by the siren song of fame and fortune to complete a simple rescue mission. No one knows what is down in the dungeon. No one knows what happened to the adventurers who entered and were never seen again. This is why we call in the professionals. Or at least the mercs who are greedy enough.


This special episode was done for the annual 24-hour charity stream that took place on April 26-27, 2025! The 24 hour event raised money for The Trevor Project. The Trevor Project is the leading national organization providing crisis intervention and suicide prevention services to lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender, queer & questioning (LGBTQ) young people under 25. You can find out more about this amazing organization on their website www.thetrevorproject.org.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart! 


Want the world to see your fan art?

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 135 - Game Time
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 135 - Game Time
item.description:
T'Chuck and Selene continue their elbow rubbing with the Farholde elite but the sudden appearance of a certain long lost mother has them both spooked. They are professionals though, so surely they can handle this blast from the past without resorting to unneeded violence. Plus, the weird truth telling game is sure to make things awkward what with all their lies and lying.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 133 - Split the Party Party
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 133 - Split the Party Party
item.description:
T'Chuck and Selene had a hugely difficult task - appear normal at a party with Farholde's movers and shakers. They each had about a centepedes worth of feet they could stick in their moths if they said the wrong thing or angered the wrong person so it was going to be tricky. Lucky for them, they are super smart and nice and everyone thinks they are super cool.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 131 - Action Wives
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 131 - Action Wives
item.description:
We were treated to a deeper tour of Screech's secret lair and found way more than we bargained for. Seeing inside the mind of this masked vigilante may be too much for some. Others may finally understand what drives his thirst for justice. And still others may get defensive and say "being that obsessed with your 23 ex-wives isn't that weird...".


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 128 - Death Chute
item.description:
We continue deeper into the lair of Squirrel Man, the former alter ego of Screech Echo. Many memories and painful failures assault our stealthy animal hero. Will they be strong enough to weather the onslaught? Or will they take their nut and scamper away....


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart! 


Podcast art by https://bsky.app/profile/killurmonkeyart.bsky.social!

Want the world to see your fan art?

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 127 - Tree Traps
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 127 - Tree Traps
item.description:
Screech Echo grit his teeth and steeled himself for this unpleasant bit of business. Returning home to these dark streets, these crime filled alleyways brought about old emotions. "They better have not touched my 30 foot penny" he growled out. "What did you say Screech?" the rest of the party asked "Nothing...just the sound of justice cawing through the wind...". "


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart! 


Podcast art by https://www.instagram.com/tami_doodles/!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 126 - Tree Time
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 126 - Tree Time
item.description:
Having saved the city, and more importantly, Dankmas, our heroes head back to the resistance hideout to get some much needed rest. The days ahead were assuredly full of action and adventure, especially with Screech wanting to scope out his giant tree house? Hideout?


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: BONUS EPISODE: Surviving with Nika
item.itunes:title: BONUS EPISODE: Surviving with Nika
item.description:
This is a special side episode where Nika Howard is trying to survive during a zombie apocalypse! Her companions have not returned from a food run and things are looking bad. Listen to the other special eps in this series with Jennifer Cheek here, Michael DiMauro here, and Tim Lanning here!


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 125 - Boot-licker Beatdown
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 125 - Boot-licker Beatdown
item.description:
Ok so we chose to not keep a low profile. Whoops. But, it has been a real long time since we have gotten to do a bar brawl and it turns out some folks are so annoying that no one cares if you beat them up. That's a win, win scenario I'd say.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R’Oarc (Nika Howard), T’Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart! 


Podcast art by https://bsky.app/profile/zackmeyman.bsky.social! Want the world to see your fan art? Post it with #DrunksAndDoodles.

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 124 - Welcome to Farholde
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 124 - Welcome to Farholde
item.description:
We have finally made it to Farholde! Well, the city proper and not a cemetery or a sewer in or around the city. But the proper city! So it's time to shop and quickly get distracted by all the sights and sounds and wives.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R’Oarc (Nika Howard), T’Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 123 - Aliases Aplenty
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 123 - Aliases Aplenty
item.description:
Your heroes return to Ratma after their victory over the Medusa. They are really making a name for themselves within the resistance as both reliable and intriguing. Although maybe they should lay low since they are still very much wanted...


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R’Oarc (Nika Howard), T’Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 122 - Rock Hard Heroes
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 122 - Rock Hard Heroes
item.description:
The underground mushroom farm seems to have a beast who has taking a liking to its tenders. Maybe the folks in the resistance are soft, but these freaking monsters made quick work of them. Time for the real heroes to step and show them how things are done.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R’Oarc (Nika Howard), T’Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 121 - Armored to Protect Those that I Love
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 121 - Armored to Protect Those that I Love
item.description:
We joined Ratma's band of misfits because it seemed like the right thing to do but most importantly they gave us a lot of loot! I'd like to think we would have joined regardless, being heroes and all, but, honestly, who knows?


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R’Oarc (Nika Howard), T’Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 120 - The Resistance
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 120 - The Resistance
item.description:
After returning to the circus we are met by an old friend who changes the course of our lives in ways we can't really fully understand. Can we step up and be the heroes we realm needs? Or are we way in over our heads? Only time will tell.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R’Oarc (Nika Howard), T’Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 119 - You Do Not Gotta Hand it to The Jokester
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 119 - You Do Not Gotta Hand it to The Jokester
item.description:
We learn some odd and, frankly, disturbing things about The Jokester that really throws us for a loop. Will this change anything about our core opinions of him? No, because we are stubborn. But at least we can have a weird things to mention about him other than his generally creepy vibe.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R’Oarc (Nika Howard), T’Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 118 - A Long Hallway of Fractured Nightmares
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 118 - A Long Hallway of Fractured Nightmares
item.description:
This...mirror thing continues to attack us and shred us to pieces but have no fear because it feels like it is getting smaller. It is really hard to tell if we are hurting a swirling mass of shattered glass but it feels like we are winning? Maybe? Or at least not losing. Maybe


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R’Oarc (Nika Howard), T’Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 117 - Ignorance is Terrifying
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 117 - Ignorance is Terrifying
item.description:
A funny little thing happened while recording this episode - DnDBeyond went down. So, we tried to make the most of it and just sorta vaguely remember what our characters did and what their stats were. We really have become complacent and too used to technology...all that being said I still can't go back to paper character sheets.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R’Oarc (Nika Howard), T’Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!  


Podcast art by http://x.com/zackmeyman! Want the world to see your fan art? Tweet it with #DrunksAndDoodles.


Find more info by clicking right here – https://linktr.ee/GAPCast

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 116 - Neitherworld!
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 116 - Neitherworld!
item.description:
My good friend Screech does a big whoopsie and gets sucked into a damn mirror world, or something like that. Honestly, there were a lot of rules thrown our way so we couldn't really keep up but I feel like we will eventually figure it out.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R’Oarc (Nika Howard), T’Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 115 - Do Not Say His Name
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 115 - Do Not Say His Name
item.description:
We are stuck in this weird haunted house with weird haunted glass creatures trying to kill us. This day sucks but I guess we knew it was going to be a huge pain in the backside when we decided to attempt to trick an assassin's guild.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R’Oarc (Nika Howard), T’Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 114 - Cemetery Plots

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 113 - Frog Factions
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 113 - Frog Factions
item.description:
Having found emperor Beau extremely dead and stabbed, our heroes now must face the tough decision of using illegal magic to bring him back. Obviously they should...but, like, he could be really, really weird about the whole thing and it make be annoying and not worth it.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R’Oarc (Nika Howard), T’Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 112 - Small, Evil Frogs
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 112 - Small, Evil Frogs
item.description:
After our shopping trip we decided that we had to at least make an appearance at the circus. Especially since folks seemed so happy that we killed that hydra and everyone wanted to congratulate us. Unfortunately, we quickly realized that there were a few folks missing from the festivities...


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R’Oarc (Nika Howard), T’Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!  


Podcast art by https://x.com/ZackMeyman! Want the world to see your fan art? Tweet it with #DrunksAndDoodles.

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 111 - Hydra Haulers
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 111 - Hydra Haulers
item.description:
The hard part, we thought, was over. We beat the hydra and avoid drowning somehow but getting hunks of this dead beast and a bunch of underwater treasure back to that rickety ship was harder than we would like to admit. Sure, we had the Hole and the Rope to ease the whole process, and honestly we couldn't have done it without them, but swimming in a huge pool of hydra blood is really unpleasant.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R’Oarc (Nika Howard), T’Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!  


Podcast art by https://www.instagram.com/artisticflair2004/! Want the world to see your fan art? Tweet it with #DrunksAndDoodles.

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 110 - Hydra Hell
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 110 - Hydra Hell
item.description:
R'Ork magically showed back up but oddly that isn't the most pressing concern right now. Honestly, we felt a little bad about ignoring her apparition but a literal murderous hydra was trying to pull our Too Big of a Boat into an underwater cave. Underwater caves are about the most dangerous place anywhere so things are not going great all and all. This town better be thankful...


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R’Oarc (Nika Howard), T’Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!  


Podcast art byhttps://x.com/ZackMeyman! Want the world to see your fan art? Tweet it with #DrunksAndDoodles.

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 109 - Pappy and the Sea Monster
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 109 - Pappy and the Sea Monster
item.description:
After meeting that magical merchant the gang really wants to make some quick gold and luckily there is a bounty right up their alley. Apparently a nasty and mysterious sea monster has been plaguing some fisherman and now it's our job to teach it a lesson while earning some cold hard gold.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R’Oarc (Nika Howard), T’Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!  


Podcast art by https://twitter.com/Floyd_jpg! Want the world to see your fan art? Tweet it with #DrunksAndDoodles.

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 108 - The Black Market
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 108 - The Black Market
item.description:
The rules of who are good or bad in all this is so confusing. Sure, we saved the life of someone because a bad guy who had a bounty on their head started making a ruckus but the person we saved also had a bounty on their head. But their crime was selling magical goods to folks not like killing folks and well, sometimes folks need magic items. So things are getting confusing is what we are saying.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R’Oarc (Nika Howard), T’Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 107 - Bad Guy Bar Fight
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 107 - Bad Guy Bar Fight
item.description:
This town is so weird and it sucks so bad that I am starting to think that the whole empire is rotten. Sure, I guess, there are a lot of great folks around but it is the specific things that bring down its value. Like a bar chock full of criminals wanted for crimes. A bar that we were warned not to go to but there was a reason we wanted to go there... I think. Probably.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R’Oarc (Nika Howard), T’Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!  


Podcast art by http://www.twitter.com/dicefiiish! Want the world to see your fan art? Tweet it with #DrunksAndDoodles.


Find more info by clicking right here – https://linktr.ee/GAPCast

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 106 - Bakery Business
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 106 - Bakery Business
item.description:
Strange people keep coming up to Screech and handing him things or whispering in his ear. This wouldn't be that weird since he such an important dude but we just got to this town and no one should know that we are here. Strange times ahead...


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R’Oarc (Nika Howard), T’Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 105 - Welcome to Brookwillow
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 105 - Welcome to Brookwillow
item.description:
I can already smell the fresh baked goods in the air as we approach the town of Brookwillow. It has been so long since we have had a chance to eat a good meal or even relax. We deserve this little rest and we can put the whole treason stuff behind us for a few hours at least.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R’Oarc (Nika Howard), T’Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!  


Podcast art by https://twitter.com/IForgetHisName! Want the world to see your fan art? Tweet it with #DrunksAndDoodles.

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 104 - Missing in Action
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 104 - Missing in Action
item.description:
Somehow we survived the "bandits" attack against "us" and the OT. "Unfortunate" the OT did not. So let's loot their bodies!!


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R’Oarc (Nika Howard), T’Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 103 - A Simple Stabbing Mistake
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 103 - A Simple Stabbing Mistake
item.description:
The gang arrives at the OT checkpoint and I think we can all agree they do well under pressure, generally speaking. Hopefully the rest of the circus act cool so that we can lay low and remain chill without alerting the OT.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R’Oarc (Nika Howard), T’Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 102 - Hole
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 102 - Hole
item.description:
Our heroes must make their way safely through an OT checkpoint and they can't quite figure out how to not get executed on sight. Ideally, there won't be any bloodshed but let's be honest here, they are doing at least 4 treasons currently so I wouldn't bet on peaceful.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R’Oarc (Nika Howard), T’Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro.  Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: BONUS EP - WASTELAND (Part 2)
item.itunes:title: BONUS EP - WASTELAND (Part 2)
item.description:
GAPCAST crew in a Post Apocalypse setting! This special episode was done for the annual 24-hour charity stream that took place on April 29-30, 2024! The 24 hour event raised money for The Trevor Project. The Trevor Project is the leading national organization providing crisis intervention and suicide prevention services to lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender, queer & questioning (LGBTQ) young people under 25. You can find out more about this amazing organization on their website www.thetrevorproject.org.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R’Oarc (Nika Howard), T’Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!  


Podcast art by https://twitter.com/ZackMeyman! Want the world to see your fan art? Tweet it with #DrunksAndDoodles.


Find more info by clicking right here – https://linktr.ee/GAPCast

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 101 - Empire of Lies
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 101 - Empire of Lies
item.description:
Man I don't even know anymore. Couldn't we just get some rest and relaxation for like a day on the road? No, now we have to unravel some sort of supe complex and dangerous political plot. Never should have started talking to clowns.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.itunes:summary:
Man I don't even know anymore. Couldn't we just get some rest and relaxation for like a day on the road? No, now we have to unravel some sort of supe complex and dangerous political plot. Never should have started talking to clowns.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 100 - Campaign 2: Episode 100 - Train Car of Revelations
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 100 - Campaign 2: Episode 100 - Train Car of Revelations
item.description:
This new, jacked clown has the crew in a sort of tizzy. Are they a secret bad guy trying to sabotage the circus? Perhaps a rival circus has planted a rogue actor to derail us before we ever reach Farholde?! Well, buckle up because their identity and intentions must be unmasked!


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 99 - Class is in Session
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 99 - Class is in Session
item.description:
Nothing like a stinky, leaky room to make you want to go and change the world. To find some young minds and shape them for the future. To maybe start a coup or blood feud with a jacked clown. The possibilities are endless.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 98 - Be Free (My Cuties)
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 98 - Be Free (My Cuties)
item.description:
Now that the bulk of the of bandits are dealt with we now must figure out what to do with the caged beasts. Sure, they look evil, but is an animal really evil? Could we not train them to love and care for the earth? Wait I think that one just threatened me.....


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 96 - Morality and Murder
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 96 - Morality and Murder
item.description:
After a slightly disturbing miscommunication with J'Michael our heroes must shake it off and head towards the bandits lair. Well... they can't shake it off entirely since it is going to be super confusing when the battle starts and all those bandits get killed. So, it looks like it is time for a class in ethics, time travel and morality.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R’Oarc (Nika Howard), T’Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 94 - Caravan Raid
item.description:

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 93 - The Circus Conundrum
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 93 - The Circus Conundrum
item.description:
Our heroes return to the traveling caravan to find it mostly intact with R'Oarc safe and sound. But will the divisions between the clowns and jugglers be able to be calmed down to a somewhat safe degree?? As long as the team is on the same page everything should be fine.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 91 - A Sticky Friendship
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 91 - A Sticky Friendship
item.description:
Ok, bruised, battered and bloodied we leave the jungle but with victory shining bright on our faces. These stone giants will surely sing our praises as we are clearly the heroes of the decade. But we don't do it for rewards or accolades... as long as they have money.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 84 - Full Circus
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 84 - Full Circus
item.description:
Our heroes solved all the circus based calamities so now they can get focused on their next problem - R'Oarc is missing. Well, most like we know where she it, since we know where The Jokester is hiding. So, like she is obviously with him.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 82 - Clown Capitalism
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 82 - Clown Capitalism
item.description:
Somehow we've returned from that land of winter but find ourselves surrounded by a circus fire. Can we pull it together to bring harmony to this traveling band of merrymakers?! Well, we better since they are our ride to the Farhold.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.description:
Join the Gapcast crew as they are led through a special holiday-themed adventure written and GM'd by Pat Edwards. The adventure was created for ELDRITCH FOUNDRY and is offered on their site for free download! They have custom miniatures that you can buy to use for it! Use offer code geekly10 at checkout for 10% off your first order!


Link the the free downloadable adventure: https://eldritch-foundry.com/gratefulgathering/


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: BONUS EPISODE: GAPCAST FIASCO 2023 - Part 2
item.itunes:title: BONUS EPISODE: GAPCAST FIASCO 2023 - Part 2
item.description:
It has been way too long since we played Fiasco so we were super excited to get wild with this very fun story telling game. Fiasco is like a Coen Brothers movie in that things typically break bad and our characters face some truly horrible things. Also, a big part of Fiasco is setting up the game itself, which is really fun. We recorded this on a weekend night so things get pretty loose.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!  


Want the world to see your fan art? Tweet it with #DrunksAndDoodles.


Find more info by clicking right here - https://linktr.ee/GAPCast 

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 77 - They Are Coming
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 77 - They Are Coming
item.description:
Politically speaking things are about to get not that chill in the region. We have been able to ignore most upheavals, political or otherwise, in the past but now, well, things are much more complicated. At least we ranked important enough to use a spooky ghost communication. Good to feel appreciated.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 75 - - Son of A...

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 74 - Selene's Very Bad Furniture Day
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 74 - Selene's Very Bad Furniture Day
item.description:
Seems we caught our culprit responsible for the deaths around mushroom town. Now we just need to approach this with care since she is obviously powerful. We can do that...


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 72 - Spore Buddies
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 72 - Spore Buddies
item.description:
Being a hero is tough but the benefit of seeing the look of relief on the faces of those you save is better than a whole pot of gold. Well, no use in complaining since this is the life we live and it is pretty darn great.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Bonus Episode: SPACE WORMS
item.itunes:title: Bonus Episode: SPACE WORMS
item.description:
GAPCAST crew in space! This special episode was done for the annual 24-hour charity stream that took place on April 29-30, 2023! The 24 hour event raised money for The Trevor Project. The Trevor Project is the leading national organization providing crisis intervention and suicide prevention services to lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender, queer & questioning (LGBTQ) young people under 25. You can find out more about this amazing organization on their website www.thetrevorproject.org.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!


Podcast art by https://twitter.com/ZackMeyman! Want the world to see your fan art? Tweet it with #DrunksAndDoodles.


Find more info by clicking right here - https://linktr.ee/GAPCast 

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

Guest DM, Pat Edwards, takes Rachel "Quirky" Schenk, Tim Lanning, Nika Howard, and Adam Lance Garcia on an excursion through the afterlife in a showcase of The Godless. A new original core player class featured in the upcoming indie 5E campaign book: The Black Ballad.


Preorders for The Black Ballad can be made here: https://the-black-ballad.backerkit.com/hosted_preorders


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 66 - Geeklycon 2023 - The Four Heroic Hurdles
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 66 - Geeklycon 2023 - The Four Heroic Hurdles
item.description:
Thank you so much to everyone who came out for our GeeklyCon 2023 live show! It was a little different and I think the more personal touch really upped the energy on the stage. Truly we cannot thank y'all enough, even if you were not there! You are all a part of helping make yet another live show a reality.


This is a non-spoiler mostly canonical episode where our heroes must complete a series of tasks for Ratma. It is good for old and new fans alike and a great way to get your buds into the show.


Super huge thank you to David and his crew for setting up and recording and filming. Video version to be posted a little bit after this audio version.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!  


Want the world to see your fan art? Tweet it with #DrunksAndDoodles.


Find more info by clicking right here - https://linktr.ee/GAPCast 

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 62 - Three Weeks Later
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 62 - Three Weeks Later
item.description:
We have finally found some sense of peace after running for our lives from Rimeford. Ahead of us is pain and struggle but for now we try to bring some healing to the a small part of the world. Mineford will grow and thrive as a refuge for outcasts. It will be one bright spot no matter how bleak things become.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.itunes:summary:
We have finally found some sense of peace after running for our lives from Rimeford. Ahead of us is pain and struggle but for now we try to bring some healing to the a small part of the world. Mineford will grow and thrive as a refuge for outcasts. It will be one bright spot no matter how bleak things become.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 61 - A Distracting Hot Spring
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 61 - A Distracting Hot Spring
item.description:
The time has finally come! That is a pun, of course, since our quest to restore J’Michael is nearing completion. That is also somewhat of a pun. Sorta. None of us want to be around for what happens once our new dragon ally gets their mojo back so we obviously ignore it and hop into the hot springs.


Also, video version of our kickstarter episodes are being released so be sure to check your email.


Also super DUPER thank you to Landan Smith, Dan M. Garcia, James Stanley, Jeffrey Tien, Mike Weber, Charlene MacPherson, AngryArmadillo, Craig Girten, William Pettibone and Jonah Eisenstock.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 60 - Big Bone Baddie
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 60 - Big Bone Baddie
item.description:
There are honestly way too many bones here... which I suppose we should have expected. But don't look a bone horse in the mouth is what my granddad always said. And, well, maybe that will help us secure Mineford for Ratma in some small way. A bone based way.


This is the Fifth episode of our Kickstarter funded recording weekend! Super special thank you to David for editing this monster. Video versions coming soooooooon!


Also super DUPER thank you to Landan Smith, Dan M. Garcia, James Stanley, Jeffrey Tien, Mike Weber, Charlene MacPherson, AngryArmadillo, Craig Girten, William Pettibone and Jonah Eisenstock.

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 59 - Bony Horizon
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 59 - Bony Horizon
item.description:

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 58 - Spidered Man
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 58 - Spidered Man
item.description:
Two spiders with one rock type of solution, that is what we are all about. Or maybe it is killing two quests with one spider..? Unsure, but, that is what makes us the greatest, our ability to multitask even when that task is still a singular task. I think I am have too much spider venom in my blood and I need a cleric.


This is the Third episode of our Kickstarter funded recording weekend! Super special thank you to David for editing this monster. Video versions coming soooooooon!


Also super DUPER thank you to Landan Smith, Dan M. Garcia, James Stanley, Jeffrey Tien, Mike Weber, Charlene MacPherson, AngryArmadillo, Craig Girten, William Pettibone and Jonah Eisenstock.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 57 - Our Noodley Ally
item.description:

item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 56 - The Chasm
item.description:
We continue on our way to find the Abbot. Sure hope they can sort out this here dragon's head... if not, well, at least the sights are neat. This trip is absolutely going in the scrapbook.

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 55 - Shark Problems
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 55 - Shark Problems
item.description:
Ratma knows what we need to do to sort out J'Michael and fortunately that also overlaps with helping her get rid of a pesky problem. Hopefully Ratma isn't lying... you never know with her. One time she had me fight off some giant slugs just because they blocked "the good part of the basement I use for doing my stretches".


This is our first episode of our Kickstarter funded recording weekend! I was so much fun and we are so thankful for all of you for making it a reality. Super special thank you to David for editing this monster. Video versions coming soooooon!


Also super DUPER thank you to Landan Smith, Dan M. Garcia, James Stanley, Jeffrey Tien, Mike Weber, Charlene MacPherson, AngryArmadillo, Craig Girten, William Pettibone and Jonah Eisenstock.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!  


Want the world to see your fan art? Tweet it with #DrunksAndDoodles.

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 54 - Welcome to Mineford
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 54 - Welcome to Mineford
item.description:
Well we survived our first obstacle in the caves beneath Rimeford. Who knows how long we have travelled but our bones are weary and our hearts are full because it feels like there is a settlement around the corner here, under ground! What joy!


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 52 - Breaking Free
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 52 - Breaking Free
item.description:
Selene has been putting off her big OT based decision for some time now. It was prudent to wait and see just what sort of danger she was in just in case everything was fine and dandy. But with the battalion of soldiers and who knows what else heading to Rimeford it seems like that decision needs to be made today. Good luck and all that.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 51 - Down the Stairs
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 51 - Down the Stairs
item.description:
With the news that the OT is going to be bringing a ton of heat to Rimeford, our heroes must devise a way to safely run for their lives. And run away in a way that keeps them from getting yelled at.

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 49 - Eve of the OT
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 49 - Eve of the OT
item.description:
Sometime today the OT folks will show up and that will be the real test of whether or not we will be safe to leave Rimeford. Selene doesn't seem to notice anything afoot so that is a good sign. We will take all the good signs we can get and hold on to them for dear life.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Bonus Ep - The Black Ballad
item.itunes:title: Bonus Ep - The Black Ballad
item.description:
Selene wakes up in a strange world and is told some horrible news - she is dead. Join us on this fun bonus episode through the afterlife DMed by Pat Edwards. We also welcome Katie and Ben from Amateurish Productions.


Interested in finding out more about The Black Ballad? Well, click this link to find out more info and to be alerted when their project is live on Backer Kit. Be sure to spread the Geekly love and thank the folks who guested this week.


Our Kickstarter is running from January 31st through February 21st! (2023) geeklyinc.com/kickstarter


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 48 - Loose Ends
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 48 - Loose Ends
item.description:
Before we explore our options in other locales we need to make sure all our little problems are all tied up here in Rimeford. Suffice it to say that these two weeks have created a few messes here and there and we would be remiss if we didn't at least try to make them better. We are also not admitting fault at this time. Coincidences happen.


Our Kickstarter is running from January 31st through February 21st! (2023) geeklyinc.com/kickstarter


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 47 - Who Jokes The Jokester?
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 47 - Who Jokes The Jokester?
item.description:
It is starting to feel like way too many weird things are happening around here to be a coincidence. Maybe that means something for us. Maybe it is our fault. Who knows and what do I care? I'm rich.

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 46 - Clown Cave
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 46 - Clown Cave
item.description:
That Jokester! He is up to his, I assume, old tricks! Just what is his game here? What goes on in the little freak mind of his?! Our heroes can't just let a being like that wander around loose. They gotta do something!


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 45 - The Wards
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 45 - The Wards
item.description:
Our heroes confront the menagerie (I think there are enough of them to be a menagerie?) of villains after Screech. What possibly could they want from this simply industrialist who doesn't leave his house at night but is friends with Night's Vengeance?

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 43 - Fort Alone
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 43 - Fort Alone
item.description:
We must be pretty smart AND capable because we have a plan to trap a few evil villains and bring them to justice before they can hurt our friend Screech. Who knows why they are here... who knows if Screech deserves it... but will our collective will be enough??!?


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 41 - Slumber Party

item.title: Bonus Episode: Songs of Chaos Part 2
item.itunes:title: Bonus Episode: Songs of Chaos Part 2
item.description:
A band of young warriors and their dragon companions set out across the sea in search of the one who betrayed and murdered their mentor. Along the way, they must fend off undead horrors from both above the water and below. Who knows what new trials and challenges await them on the shores of this new land.


Our guest GM, Pat Edwards, leads us on the adventure using the Songs of Chaos dragon riding rules created by the team at Wider Path Games.


You can find out more information about their kickstarter right here.


And, if you pledge using our link we will get a little kissy in return. Win Win! #ad for potential legal purposes?!?


The song: Chichi No Hone is from the album Roll For Streetwise.


Find more info by clicking right here - https://linktr.ee/GAPCast 

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

Along the way, they must fend off undead horrors from both above the water and below. Who knows what new trials and challenges await them on the shores of this new land.


Our guest GM, Pat Edwards, leads us on the adventure using the Songs of Chaos dragon riding rules created by the team at Wider Path Games.


You can find out more information about their kickstarter right here.


And, if you pledge using our link we will get a little kissy in return. Win Win! #ad for potential legal purposes?!?


Find more info by clicking right here - https://linktr.ee/GAPCast 

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: Bonus Episode: Tales From the Foaming Tankard : Patch Work - Episode 1: Mixed Messages
item.itunes:title: Bonus Episode: Tales From the Foaming Tankard : Patch Work - Episode 1: Mixed Messages
item.description:
Season 5: "Patch Work"

Episode 1:  "Mixed Messages"


Strange events are occurring all around Drunkeros. Tears in reality, portals, and mysteries await.

Only Brip Brap (Tim Lanning), Brightfist (Carla Maxted from Dumbgeons & Dragons Podcast), Frankie (Russ More from Dumbgeons & Dragons Podcast), and Breyfiel (David Stewart) have what it takes to discover the source of what is causing it all.


Join them in their quest!


Dungeon Mastered by Alex Vincent aka Mister Red aka the Greetings Adventurer’s Wiki Editor


Additional Voices:

Bart the bartender is played by Michael DiMauro

Bar Patrons played by entire cast


Follow the Dumbgeons & Dragons Podcast on Twitter and TikTok

Hosted on Acast. See acast.com/privacy for more information.

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 33 - Adult Conversations
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 33 - Adult Conversations
item.description:
Screech disappears but the rest of the gang attempt to recover from their dangerous mine excursion. They also enter something called "level 5". Sounds exciting and naughty.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro.  Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 26 - To Foment and Brew a Revolution
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 26 - To Foment and Brew a Revolution
item.description:
With Skin Kyle not exploded and Seline shown just how different things are from what she thought was taught her whole life leaves the gang is in an interesting spot. Do they do the right thing even though it is dangerous? Or do they just keep chilling and hope some other band of adventurers figures it out. Find out today!


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!

item.title: Campaign 2: Episode 25 - GeeklyCon 2022 Live Show
item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 25 - GeeklyCon 2022 Live Show
item.description:
Welcome to our 2022 GeeklyCon live show! it is a fully canonical episode where we advance our slightly tense situation with the OT. Also Ratma sends us on a weird quest.


Thank you so much to the audience for being so awesome!


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!  


Want the world to see your fan art? Tweet it with #DrunksAndDoodles.

item.itunes:title: Campaign 2: Episode 24 - Metal Kyle
item.description:
The final OT member needs our help! Are we full of enough grit to save our enemies from even more enemies?! And why is the good lord testing us so much… we just want to chill.


The adventure continues with Screech Echo (Mike Bachmann), Selene Von Esper (Jennifer Cheek), R'Oarc (Nika Howard), T'Chuck (Tim Lanning), and our Dungeon Master Michael DiMauro. Don’t forget to follow our editor David Stewart!
